machineDoctor.intro: One read-only scan across everything the app can check — pin conflicts, driver values, config drift, project lint, firmware sync, hardware changes, and install health — graded A-F. Every finding links to the widget that fixes it.
machineDoctor.scoreHint: Transparent scoring: 100 − 25 per error − 8 per warning. Unknown checks never count against you.
machineDoctor.notChecked: Could not be checked (printer unreachable or no baseline).

assessment.healthy: Healthy — everything the app can check looks good.

pins.double_assign: Pin {pin} on {mcu} is assigned in more than one section.
pins.caveat: Pin {pin} on {mcu} carries an electronics caveat.

drivers.over_driver_cap: {section}: run_current {run_current} A exceeds the ~{cap} A driver ceiling.
drivers.near_driver_cap: {section}: run_current {run_current} A is within 10% of the ~{cap} A ceiling.
drivers.over_motor_rating: {section}: run_current {run_current} A exceeds the {motor} rating ({max_current} A).
drivers.near_motor_rating: {section}: run_current {run_current} A is within 10% of the {motor} rating ({max_current} A).
drivers.odd_microsteps: {section}: microsteps {microsteps} is not a power of two.

drift.pending: Klipper has unsaved SAVE_CONFIG changes pending.

project.orphan_driver: {file}: driver section "{message}" has no matching stepper.

hardware.no_baseline: No hardware baseline saved yet — save a snapshot in the Machine Map to detect changes.
